Class Parser

  • java.lang.Object
    • Parser
  • class Parser
extends java.lang.Object
    Parser for a simple infix expression language with digits and +/-. It outputs the equivalent postfix notation.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private java.util.List<ParseError> errors  
      private int lookahead  
      private java.lang.StringBuilder output  
      private int position  
      private java.io.Reader reader  
      private boolean recover  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Parser()
      Constructs a parser that reads from standard input with recovery disabled.
      Parser​(boolean recover)
      Constructs a parser that reads from standard input.
      Parser​(java.io.Reader reader, boolean recover)
      Constructs a parser with a custom reader.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Parser

        public Parser()
       throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a parser that reads from standard input with recovery disabled.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if input cannot be read

      • Parser

        public Parser​(boolean recover)
       throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a parser that reads from standard input.
        Parameters:
        recover - whether to continue after errors
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if input cannot be read

      • Parser

        public Parser​(java.io.Reader reader,
              boolean recover)
       throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a parser with a custom reader.
        Parameters:
        reader - input source
        recover - whether to continue after errors
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if input cannot be read

      • parse

        public ParseResult parse()
                  throws java.io.IOException
        Parses the input and returns the postfix result plus any errors.

        parse result
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if input cannot be read
